name: Game1K
description: Game1K is widely known online as one of MultiCraft's Top Players. Starting in 2021, Game1K has actively contributed to the PvP community since late 2024. He is also the creator of the original tier list system..

name: Timmyloal
description: Timmyloal is a famous MultiCraft PvPer that climbed the leaderboards from his impressive skill in both Emerald and Dragonhide KB. But has retired all of his tiers and quit MultiCraft in late 2025.
